data.title: In a Silent Way
data.label: Columbia Records
data.summary: The quiet before the storm of Bitches Brew — electric instruments, meditative drones, and the sound of jazz dissolving into something new.

tracks.title: In a Silent Way/It's About That Time

data.liner_notes: Recorded in February 1969, *In a Silent Way* is Miles Davis and producer Teo Macero's first fully electric statement. Teo took the day's recordings, sliced them, and rebuilt two side-long suites. Joe Zawinul's title composition became a vaporous drone under which Miles and the ensemble floated. This album is the hinge between the acoustic Second Quintet and the fusion revolution of *Bitches Brew*.
